{{Quote|A man doesn't win decoration and promotions by wasting his time at a boring job on a dead planet like this one.|Imperial Officer|<ref name="Ellie">[[Star Wars (1977) 80|''Star Wars'' (1977) 80]]</ref>}}
'''Dennaskar''' was a forest [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==History==
It was home to a secret [[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]] laboratory. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a small [[Battle of Dennaskar|skirmish]] broke out between [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces.

Later, [[Tay Vanis]] crash landed on the planet when he was fleeing from [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Vader tortured the man, leaving him in a [[persistent vegetative state]], and then spread rumors of Vanis' whereabouts to keep both Rebel and Imperial agents busy searching for a man that had already been captured.<ref name="Ellie" />

Around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] came to the world in search of Vanis. They eventually found the man with help from his droid, [[LE-914]], who upon seeing her master in his comatose state, set herself to self-destruct to mercy-kill her master. Saddened by their comrade's loss, the Rebels then left the world after destroying the [[Dead Castle|building]] that housed Vanis, as a lasting monument to the man.<ref name="Ellie" />

One of the primary [[Spaceport/Legends|starports]] on the world was the [[B Dock]].<ref name="Ellie" />

==Behind the scenes==
An originally unnamed planet appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 80|''Star Wars'' (1977) 80]], while the named world Dennaskar appeared in ''[[Surprise Visit]]''. It was ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' that tied the worlds together.
